what_it_does: This file is an interpretive, file-local proposal for augmenting the live components face (dna/molecules.json and dna/organisms.json). It maps roughly 110 harvested component findings from eight collections onto existing DNA records, ratifies most as already-present, and proposes a small set of new molecules/organisms with per-record rationale, provenance, status, conflict notes, and cross-face references.
observations: The target_face explicitly states the proposal augments molecules.json and organisms.json in place and does not create a parallel dna/components.json.
The summary claims 110 findings deduplicate to about 22 canonical components and that the dominant result is ratification, not invention.

Most live molecules (stat_couplet, raised_chip, bullet, person_row) and organisms (hub_network, mesh, comparison_matrix, testimonial, branch_tree, time_tree, cascade, porthole_row, updown_duo, bars, process_steps, stage_cards, phase_strip) are confirmed across multiple collections.

Genuine new records proposed include molecules pill, tag, glass_panel, status_dot, badge_pair, stat_orb and organisms flow_pipeline, stat_band, pill_row, plus smaller extensions scope_box, zone_divider, and product_header.
Many findings are explicitly routed to the layout lane (hero zones, split forms, dyads, footers, audience-routing strips, immersive contact slides) rather than being claimed as components.
Each augmentation carries fields: target, name, value_or_recipe, rationale, provenance, status (extends-existing or new), and conflict_note.
The file repeatedly references other DNA faces (shapes.json, connectors.json, tokens.json, grammar.json, layouts.json) and insists on reference-not-redeclare.
The pill is framed as the missing universal interactive/seal device, distinct from the tag which signals enumerable peers.
status_dot is positioned as the carve-out that legitimately uses non-gold semantic colors (green/orange) without breaking the comparison_matrix gold-not-green law.
badge_pair is defined as a label/version/pairing wrapper that references shapes.json geometry rather than redeclaring it.
flow_pipeline is identified as a real gap because it is horizontal-sequential-relational, distinct from cascade, phase_strip, value_flow, and hub_network.
The file is truncated near the end of the stat_orb record.
standouts: The pill is treated as the single biggest genuine gain: a universal interactive/seal device missing from the print-first DNA, with the derived rule radius = height/2.
The entire named-stat family (StatCard, StatCell, KPIBox, StatMetricStrip, etc.) collapses onto the existing stat_couplet and raised_chip.
flow_pipeline is explicitly called out as a sequential-relational organism the live face has no home for.
status_dot is used to resolve the latent tension between semantic green/orange and brand-gold affirmation.
The strong distinction between pill (action) and tag (equality-statement) is meaning-driven, similar to bullet.claim vs bullet.proven.
conventions: Follows the ledger convention of a target_face + summary + augmentations array.
Uses status labels 'extends-existing' and 'new' for each record.
Includes a conflict_note field that explains how the finding relates to live records.
Adheres to 'reference, never redeclare' for geometry, connectors, tokens, and grammar.
Maps composition to existing slot_bindings and generator hooks.
Provides provenance as a list of collection-specific named findings.
Maintains a neutral, file-local tone without ranking sources.
concerns: The file is truncated mid-record (stat_orb conflict_note is cut off).
Some value_or_recipe fields contain pseudo-JSON/object notation inside strings, which may need normalization before schema ingestion.
The summary says 'six genuine new records' but the list includes more than six items plus extensions, creating a slight counting ambiguity.
Several design decisions are explicitly deferred to 'Tim' via open_questions rather than resolved here.
Some proposed records (scope_box, zone_divider, product_header) sit at the boundary between component and layout, and their final home is not fully settled in this file.
notes: A design-vocabulary reconciliation brief: most findings ratify existing molecules/organisms, while a handful of new records fill semantic and compositional gaps, all anchored to existing token/connector/shape/grammar faces.
questions: What is the final canonical name for the new interactive device — pill, action, or seal?
Should the stat_orb circular stat container be a separate molecule, or does it conflict with the circle-as-shape / circle-as-media-window law?
Is the ordinal-pill a distinct molecule, or just the active state of phase_strip or pill_row?
Where does the V-brand signature stamp (gold circle + white V) belong — shapes/identity or another face?
How will the pseudo-JSON recipe strings be normalized into the strict molecules.json/organisms.json schema?
Are scope_box, zone_divider, and product_header organisms or layout-lane devices?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file presents itself as a neutral, file-local interpretive layer for the components face and does exactly that, proposing augmentations without ranking sources or minting parallel files.
intention_signals: The file is trying to consolidate a large, noisy harvest of named UI components into a tight, reusable DNA vocabulary by deduplicating variants onto existing records and only minting new records when a device carries a distinct semantic or compositional job, while keeping layout concerns out of the components lane.
novelty: The interpretive 'components-to-compositions ladder' framing and the explicit policy against creating a parallel components.json; the pill/tag meaning distinction; status_dot as the semantic-color carve-out; and flow_pipeline as a horizontal-sequential-relational organism distinct from cascade, hub_network, and value_flow.
contribution: A structured reconciliation of 110 component findings into existing and proposed DNA records, with per-record provenance, conflict notes, and cross-face references, that a fused system could use to decide which records to confirm, extend, or add without re-deriving the mapping.
summary_for_embedding: Proposed components-face augmentation document that deduplicates 110 harvested UI component findings from eight collections into existing DNA molecules and organisms, ratifies most, and proposes new molecules/organisms such as pill, tag, glass_panel, status_dot, badge_pair, stat_orb, and flow_pipeline, with rationale, provenance, and cross-face references.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a neutral, file-local interpretive layer that maps harvested component findings onto the live components face and identifies minimal new records without minting parallel files or ranking sources.
